description_long: This cash register features a robust, angular body constructed from dark, stone-like material, giving it a heavy and industrial appearance. The front section houses a recessed workspace with a colorful, illuminated keypad and a central display screen, which appears to be an LCD. The screen is set into a raised panel, slightly angled for user visibility, and the keypad is surrounded by metallic and plastic detailing. The sides are thick and blocky, providing structural support and a sense of durability, while the rear is solid and unadorned. The overall design suggests a secure, tamper-resistant device suitable for high-traffic urban environments. No visible branding or receipt printer slot is present, and the cash drawer is implied by the structure beneath the keypad.
description: A heavy, industrial cash register with a dark stone-like body, central LCD screen, and colorful keypad. Its robust design suggests durability and security for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the LCD screen, colorful keypad, and recessed workspace, highlighting the main interactive area.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the thickness of the body and the angled placement of the screen and keypad.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a solid, unadorned back with no visible interactive features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the blocky structure and side profile of the screen and keypad.
attribute_keypad_layout: rectangular grid with multiple colored keys, function and numeric keys visible
